heroTitle: Two families. One promise. A lifetime beginning by the sea.
heroSubtitle: Join us in Chennai as Marion Jemima and Livingston exchange their vows — first before God, then beneath the stars on the shore.
introQuote: Not every love story begins with a glance across a room. Ours began with a quiet conversation, a family's blessing, and the slow, certain knowledge that this was exactly right.
venueAddress: Malaiyappa Mudali St, Kelambakkam, Tamil Nadu 603103
receptionVenueAddress: Vadanemilli Village, Before Crocodile Park, SH 49, Mahabalipuram, Tamil Nadu 603104
dressCode: Formal and semi-formal attire. For the reception, think coastal elegance — whites, creams, soft golds, and touches of green.
thankYouMessage: There is a particular kind of grace in being surrounded by the people who have known you longest and loved you best — and that is exactly what you gave us on the twentieth of May. You crossed cities, rearranged calendars, and showed up with open hearts. The church was full because of you. The shoreline glowed because of you. Every laugh, every tear, every dance was a gift we will carry into every year that follows. Thank you for witnessing the beginning of our forever. With all our love — Marion Jemima & Livingston.
highlights: A sacred church ceremony at Divine Mercy Church, Kelambakkam
A coastal beach reception at Blue Bay Beach Resort, Mahabalipuram
Personalised guest invitations with RSVP and live-day hub

story.title: A meeting arranged with care
story.description: In August of 2025, two families who had each prayed for the right match sat down together for the first time. Marion Jemima and Livingston were introduced with quiet hopes on both sides — and found, in each other, something that felt immediately familiar.

story.title: Getting to know each other
story.description: Through the final months of 2025, they spoke — of faith, of family, of what they hoped a life together might look like. Each conversation left less unsaid than the one before. It was not fireworks. It was something quieter and more certain than that.

story.title: A yes that changed everything
story.description: By February of 2026, both families had given their blessing and both hearts had said yes. The engagement was a celebration of two families becoming one — and of two people choosing, with full knowledge and full joy, to begin.

story.title: The months before the altar
story.description: The months between the engagement and the wedding were filled with the quiet business of building a life — flowers chosen, vows considered, families knitting themselves together. And through all of it, a growing sense of peace about what was coming.

stages.title: The Invitation
stages.description: A personalised digital invitation for every guest — with the full story, schedule, travel guide, and RSVP.

stages.title: The Wedding Day
stages.description: A live hub for the day itself — real-time updates, guest messages, photo uploads, and the livestream.

stages.title: The Memory Vault
stages.description: A private, permanent archive for family — albums, anniversary capsules, and memories preserved forever.

rituals.title: The Nuptial Mass
rituals.description: The heart of a Catholic wedding. The couple exchanges their vows before God, the priest, and their families during the Holy Mass. The exchange of rings seals the covenant — a promise made not just between two people, but before the whole of heaven.

rituals.title: The Exchange of Vows
rituals.description: In their own words, Marion Jemima and Livingston will promise to love, honour, and cherish each other — in joy and in sorrow, in plenty and in want — for the rest of their lives. This is the moment the church holds its breath.

rituals.title: The Blessing of the Rings
rituals.description: The wedding rings are blessed by the priest and exchanged as a visible sign of the vows spoken. A circle without beginning or end — a symbol of love that does not stop.

rituals.title: The Unity Candle
rituals.description: Two candles — one representing Marion Jemima's family, one Livingston's — are used to light a single central flame together. Two lives, two families, one new light.

rituals.title: The Final Blessing & Recessional
rituals.description: The priest pronounces the couple husband and wife and blesses their union. They walk back down the aisle together for the first time as one — greeted by the joy of everyone who came to witness it.
